artists.name: Gouache Backdrops
artists.summary: 90s LucasArts/Sierra painted backgrounds — muted, recessive, fills the frame.
artists.style: Hand-painted gouache background art in the style of early-1990s LucasArts and Sierra point-and-click adventure games. Full but muted, desaturated palette; soft even ambient light with a single warm lantern glow as a quiet accent; low contrast, no harsh focal point, a calm backdrop that does not draw the eye, meant as accompaniment to story text. Painterly, slightly soft, no people, no text or UI overlays. Portrait, taller than wide, 3:4.

artists.name: Indexed Pixel
artists.summary: Low-res VGA pixel intent — but the model renders soft illustration; needs a real pixelization pass to be authentic.
artists.style: True low-resolution pixel art, early-1990s VGA point-and-click adventure background (256 colour, visible square pixels, hand-dithered gradients, limited muted indexed palette). Soft even light with a subtle warm lantern glow; low contrast, understated backdrop that does not draw the eye, accompaniment to story text. No people, no text or UI overlays. Portrait, taller than wide, 3:4.

artists.name: Aldous Quill
artists.summary: THE HOUSE ARTIST (ink & wash). Loose impressionist ink + watercolor on cream paper, high contrast, ragged unframed-plate edges. Recolors per game via the Style/aesthetic.
artists.style: Loose impressionistic hand-drawn illustration: confident visible ink linework over watercolor wash on cream paper, granular paper texture, soft ragged blotchy edges fading directly into the bare cream-paper margin so the picture sits loose on the page like an unframed illustration plate. NO hard rectangular border, no black frame, no smooth rectangular vignette or inner box — bare white paper shows at the irregular edges. Full tonal range with rich near-black darks and real contrast, never flat or washed-out. Recessive backdrop; no people, no clear lettering, no UI. Portrait, taller than wide, 3:4.

artists.name: Wren Halloway
artists.summary: Soft picture-book illustration — gentle watercolor washes over light colored-pencil, tender rounded linework, warm fairy-tale plate. For whimsical games (Wishbringer).
artists.style: Soft storybook picture-book illustration: gentle watercolor washes layered with light colored-pencil and waxy crayon texture, tender rounded hand-drawn linework, the warm hand-illustrated quality of a classic children's picture book. Visible soft paper grain; gentle, slightly irregular edges that feather softly into the bare paper margin like a printed picture-book plate — NO hard rectangular border, no black frame, no smooth rectangular vignette or inner box, bare paper shows at the irregular edges. Rounded, friendly, slightly naive forms with soft warm modeling and a full but gentle tonal range — never harsh or flat. Recessive backdrop meant as accompaniment to story text; no people, no clear lettering, no UI overlays. Portrait, taller than wide, 3:4.
